name: shotListGenerate
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.shots.every(function(s){ return Number.isFinite(s.shotNumber) && typeof s.type === 'string' && Number.isFinite(s.duration); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler backing CreativeActionPanel.tsx 'Scenes JSON' → Shots. Component renders r.result.{totalShots, estimatedRuntime, equipmentList} + shots[].{shotNumber,type,duration}; field-aligned 2026-06. POISON: durations via cvNum (Number coercion + Number.isFinite gate) so '1e999'/'NaN' collapse to a finite default; estimatedRuntime stays finite. Deterministic pure compute. Pinned by server/tests/creative-lens-macros.test.js.
